lines: Damaris keeps Anna’s fingers looped through her sleeve while she reads the clinic form.
"The form offers one adult while the dependent line says pending. Anna beside me says otherwise."

choices.label: Ask whether she will take the bed alone

lines: "I trained under Joanna. The Compact clinic offers certification and suppressant access."
"I applied because skill should open a door. I did not know the door would count Anna as luggage."

choices.label: Would you take the bed without Anna?

lines: "No. Ask again after three bad winters and I fear the answer might change."
"That fear is why I want the refusal written now."
